title: ranunculus auricomus var. palustris
intro: Ranunculus auricomus var. palustris, also known as marsh crowfoot, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of marsh crowfoot include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, marsh crowfoot is often used in the form of dried root or as a decoction, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
